title: Experience Resourcepack
description: A one and done resourcepack for the players of the Experience Minecraft server.
body:
# Experience Minecraft Server Resource Pack
A resource pack designed specifically for the members of the Experience Minecraft Server, this project serves as an all-in-one solution to enhance the visual and immersive experience of Minecraft. With a streamlined installation process, this pack ensures that players can quickly jump into the world without the hassle of managing multiple add-ons.

## A More Immersive Villager Experience
One of the key features of this resource pack is its overhaul of Villagers, making them feel more like true NPCs rather than passive traders. With enhanced textures, improved animations, and new details that bring them to life, Villagers now better fit into the world. Their interactions with Iron Golems have also been reimagined, reinforcing the idea that these guardians are truly dedicated protectors of their settlements.

![Experience Throne Room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45d5b87cebdeddeda45ca3e3a68259964cc16b2a_0.webp)

## A Revamped Illager Faction
The Illagers have also received a visual and thematic upgrade. From Pillagers to Evokers, each enemy now exudes a more menacing presence, making raids feel more dynamic and dangerous. Their weapons, armor, and banners have all been adjusted to reflect their ruthless and organized nature, making them a formidable force against villages.

![Empyrean Room](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d28daa973089b13bf370dc59e44d67039a3caf70_0.webp)

## Custom Gear, Armor, and Weapons
In addition to NPC improvements, this pack introduces custom items such as new armor sets, weapons, and tools. These additions seamlessly blend into the vanilla aesthetic, ensuring that they feel like natural extensions of the base game rather than out-of-place modifications. Whether defending a village, exploring dungeons, or leading an assault against a Pillager outpost, players can do so with uniquely designed gear that enhances both visuals and gameplay.

## Ongoing Updates & Custom Versions
As time goes on, various versions of this pack will be created, each fine-tuned based on player feedback and evolving server needs. Regular updates will ensure that the visuals remain fresh, immersive, and aligned with the overall theme of the server. This means that textures, models, and potential new features will continuously be adjusted to create the most engaging experience possible.

For members of the Experience Minecraft Server, this pack serves as an essential tool for bringing the world to life, making every encounter—whether peaceful or hostile—feel more dynamic and meaningful. (Credit File Contained within package)
